name: Thrastus Flameheart
sd_appearance: A towering Dragonborn, Thrastus Flameheart, stands over 6 feet with fiery red scales and piercing amber eyes. His plate armor, bearing the insignia of the Tower Authority, is meticulously maintained, showcasing his rank. A longsword and heavy crossbow, both imbued with subtle enchantments, hang at his side. One distinctive visual detail is his left shoulder, adorned with a large, intricately crafted hawk emblem – a symbol of his senior officer status within the faction.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: armour maintained to standard, rank markings clearly displayed
